scripture_card.description: Ornate decorative border frame with white center panel. A fixed sacred concept header + translation stays at the top of every slide. Each slide carries one reflection on that concept.
scripture_card.content_prompt:
Transform this raw download into a 7-slide Instagram carousel using THE SCRIPTURE CARD pattern.

THE SCRIPTURE CARD: Choose ONE sacred concept from Islamic wisdom (a Quranic phrase, a divine attribute, or a prophetic saying) that resonates with the download's theme. This concept becomes the fixed anchor shown at the top of every slide. Each slide carries one new reflection on that concept. The effect: you return to the same anchor 7 times but arrive somewhere new each time.

TITLE: {title}
CONTENT:
{content}

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{{
  "pattern": "scripture_card",
  "header": "The sacred concept — transliteration only (e.g. Kun fa-yakun, Al-Wakeel, Tawakkul)",
  "subtitle": "English translation in quotes (e.g. \"Be, and it is\")",
  "slides": [
    "First reflection — one complete thought, 8-16 words",
    "Second reflection",
    "Third reflection",
    "Fourth reflection",
    "Fifth reflection",
    "Sixth reflection",
    "Seventh reflection — the one that lands deepest"
  ],
  "caption": "Full caption — no hashtags. Begins with the concept. Warm, spiritual, grounded.",
  "hashtags": ["10", "to", "15", "hashtags"],
  "image_prompt": "Flux prompt — ornate Islamic geometric tile border pattern, deep navy blue and gold arabesque arabesque border frame surrounding a clean white rectangular center space, traditional manuscript illumination style, intricate floral and geometric motifs, rich jewel-tone blue, ultra-detailed, NO text NO words NO letters in image"
}}
scripture_card.auto_prompt:
Study these existing downloads:

{context}

Generate ONE original insight using THE SCRIPTURE CARD pattern. One sacred concept, 7 reflections.

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{{
  "pattern": "scripture_card",
  "_title": "Name of this insight",
  "_raw_content": "The full download",
  "header": "Sacred concept transliteration",
  "subtitle": "English translation in quotes",
  "slides": ["Reflection 1", "Reflection 2", "Reflection 3", "Reflection 4", "Reflection 5", "Reflection 6", "Reflection 7"],
  "caption": "Full caption — no hashtags",
  "hashtags": ["10", "hashtags"],
  "image_prompt": "Ornate Islamic geometric border frame, navy blue and gold arabesque, white center space, manuscript style, NO text NO words in image"
}}
